metadata.description: pve-bindsnap delivered as a single Claude Code plugin: a skill to install, configure and operate pve-bindsnap (snapshot and clone Proxmox LXC containers with bind/device mounts).

plugins.name: pve-bindsnap
plugins.description: Install, verify, configure and operate pve-bindsnap on a Proxmox VE node: snapshot and clone LXC containers that have bind/device mounts.
